name: GroupBy
title: Group By
lookup_queryMapping:
SELECT 'all' AS FLC_ID, 'All' AS FLC_NAME
UNION
SELECT 'ptj' AS FLC_ID, 'PTJ' AS FLC_NAME

name: YEARS
title: Year
lookup_queryMapping: SELECT DISTINCT qbu_year flc_id, qbu_year flc_name FROM quarter_budget WHERE qbu_year IS NOT NULL

name: STAT
title: Status
lookup_queryMapping: SELECT DISTINCT bam_status_cd flc_id, bam_status_cd flc_name FROM budget_allocation_master WHERE bam_status_cd IS NOT NULL

name: bdg_year
title: Year
lookup_queryMapping:
select bdg_year AS flc_id,  
bdg_year AS flc_name  
FROM budget
GROUP BY bdg_year

name: oun_level
title: PTJ Level
lookup_queryMapping:
SELECT DISTINCT oun_level FLC_ID, oun_level FLC_NAME
FROM organization_unit where oun_level in (3,4);

name: oun_code
title: PTJ
lookup_queryMapping:
SELECT DISTINCT 
  SB.oun_code AS flc_id,
  concat_ws(' - ', SB.oun_code, oun_desc) AS flc_name
FROM structure_budget AS SB, organization_unit AS OU
	Where SB.oun_code = OU.oun_code
ORDER BY SB.oun_code;

name: bdg_status
title: Status
lookup_queryMapping:
SELECT 
	'APPROVED' AS flc_id,
	'APPROVED' AS flc_name 
UNION SELECT 
	'REJECTED' AS flc_id,
	'REJECTED' AS flc_name;

ORDER BY bmm_status ASC ;

name: fundBudgetClosing
title: Fund
lookup_queryMapping:
select distinct fty_fund_type flc_id, CONCAT(fty_fund_type,' - ',fty_fund_desc) flc_name
from fund_type
where fty_basis like '%PROJECT BASIS%'
order by fty_fund_type

name: bdg_year
title: Year
lookup_queryMapping:
SELECT DISTINCT 
  bdg_year AS flc_id,
  bdg_year AS flc_name
FROM budget AS B,structure_budget AS SB
JOIN fund_type AS FT
  ON SB.fty_fund_type = FT.fty_fund_type
WHERE	B.sbg_budget_id = SB.sbg_budget_id
AND B.bdg_status ='APPROVED'   
ORDER BY bdg_year

name: level

FROM account_main

name: oun_code
title: PTJ
lookup_queryMapping:

  SB.oun_code AS flc_id,
  concat_ws(' - ', SB.oun_code, oun_desc) AS flc_name

name: PTJ
title: PTJ
lookup_queryMapping:
SELECT DISTINCT
    ouc.oun_code value,
    CONCAT_WS(' - ', ouc.oun_code, oun.oun_desc) label
FROM
    org_unit_costcentre ouc,
    organization_unit oun
WHERE ouc.oun_code = oun.oun_code
    AND ouc_status = 1
    AND fty_fund_type = ${Fund}
ORDER BY
    1;

name: oun_code

lookup_queryMapping:
SELECT DISTINCT 
  SB.oun_code AS flc_id,
  concat_ws(' - ', SB.oun_code, oun_desc) AS flc_name
FROM structure_budget AS SB, organization_unit AS OU
	Where SB.oun_code = OU.oun_code
ORDER BY SB.oun_code;

name: budgetType
title: Budget Type
lookup_queryMapping:
SELECT
'bdgInitial' AS flc_id,
'1 - Budget Initial' AS flc_name
UNION 
SELECT
'bdgVirement' AS flc_id,
'2 - Budget Virement' AS flc_name
UNION
SELECT
'bdgRequisition' AS flc_id,
'3 - Budget Requisition' AS flc_name
UNION
SELECT
'bdgCommitment' AS flc_id,
'4 - Budget Commitment' AS flc_name
UNION
SELECT
'bdgExpenses' AS flc_id,
'5 - Budget Expenses' AS flc_name
UNION
SELECT
'bdgAllExpenses' AS flc_id,
'6 - Budget All Expenses' AS flc_name

name: CostCentre
title: Cost Centre
lookup_queryMapping:
SELECT DISTINCT
    ouc.ccr_costcentre value,
    CONCAT_WS(' - ', ouc.ccr_costcentre, cc.ccr_costcentre_desc) label
FROM
    org_unit_costcentre ouc,
    costcentre cc
WHERE
ouc.ccr_costcentre = cc.ccr_costcentre
    AND ouc.fty_fund_type = ${Fund}
    AND ouc.oun_code = {PTJ}
ORDER BY
    1;

name: lbc_budget_code
title: Budget Code
lookup_queryMapping:
SELECT DISTINCT
    acm_acct_code id,
    CONCAT_WS(' - ', acm_acct_code, acm_acct_desc) text,
    acm_acct_desc `Description`
FROM
    account_main am
WHERE
    acm_flag_budget = 'Y'
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT
            lbc_budget_code
        FROM
           lkp_budget_code lbc
        WHERE
            lbc.lbc_budget_code = am.acm_acct_code
    )
ORDER BY
    text
